name: Mount Holly Blueprint (digital overlay extraction v2) (graph mode)

coordinateSystem.note: Room centers use room ids (A1..E9, C0). Side nodes use <room>:<dir> (e.g., C1:N).

notes: Edges are inferred from colored diamonds/segments at room boundaries.
Row 0 (A0-E0) is synthetic to model the shared external starting area below C1.
Auto-converted from room grid to graph nodes with explicit side positions.
Use lanternRef / lanternRefs / passLanternRefs to constrain exact lantern-node positions.
Intra-room adjacent side edges were added to allow hallway movement without entering room centers.
